
create Tree start

    make curr_value(integer);
    make depth_L(integer);
    make depth_R(integer);
    make node_L(pointer(Tree));
    make node_R(pointer(Tree));

finish

job Insert(make root(Tree), make val(integer)) start

finish

job Exists(make root(Tree), make val(integer)) start

finish

job UpperBound(make root(Tree), make val(integer)) start

finish

job LowerBound(make root(Tree), make val(integer)) start

finish
